/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O3 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-register -fPIC -Wfatal-errors -DPYBIND11_COMPILER_TYPE=\"_gcc\" -DPYBIND11_STDLIB=\"_libstdcpp\" -DPYBIND11_BUILD_ABI=\"_cxxabi1011\" -flto -shared  -o rela.cpython-39-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/rela.dir/rela/pybind.cc.o   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib librela_lib.a /home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcuda.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvrtc.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_python.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cuda.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcufft.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcurand.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcublas.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcublasLt.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/admin/miniconda3/envs/ibrl/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
